63-74. Effects of the 12 from Karakāńś. If the 12 from Karakāńś has a

benefic, the expenses will be on good account, while a malefic in the 12

from Karakāńś will cause bad expenses. If the 12 from Karakāńś is

Grah in exaltation, or in own Bhava in the 12 from Karakāńś, or, if Ketu is
so placed and receives a Drishti from, or is yuti with a benefic, one will
attain heaven after death. One will attain full enlightenment, if Ketu is in the
th
12 identical with Mesh, or Dhanu and receives a Drishti from a benefic. If

there yuti with a malefic, one will not attain full enlightenment. If Sūrya and
